transcript: Speaker A: Yaar aaj kal kya sahi hai, kya scam pata hi nahi chalta. Free time mein English seekhne ka soch ke, ek app download kari aur uske saare lectures bhi dekh liye. Phir bhi jab bolne jata hoon tab bahut saari galtiyan hoti hai. Aur lectures ka gyaan bhi sirf app chalate waqt rehta hai, bolne par nahi. [Man, nowadays what is real and what is a scam, you can't even tell. Thinking of learning English in my free time, I downloaded an app and watched all its lectures. Still, when I go to speak, I make a lot of mistakes. And the knowledge from lectures only stays while using the app, not when speaking.] Speaker B: Dekho, baat scam ki nahi hai, sikhane ke tareeqe ki hai. English aisi cheez hai ki jab tak tum practice nahi karoge tab tak tum nahi bol paoge, chahe kitne bhi videos dekh liye ho. Meri baat mano, tum SpeakX ka subscription lo. Isme tumhe mazedar lessons milte hai, English seekhne wale games milte hai, aur sabse important, jab tum chaho, tumhe practice karne ke liye ek AI English teacher milti hai. Agar iske saath mein practice kiya, to sirf ek hafte mein, behtareen English bolne lagoge. [Look, it's not about a scam, it's about the teaching method. English is something that unless you practice, you won't be able to speak, no matter how many videos you've watched. Take my advice, get a subscription to SpeakX. In this, you get fun lessons, English learning games, and most importantly, whenever you want, you get an AI English teacher to practice with. If you practice with this, in just one week, you will start speaking excellent English.] Speaker A: AI wagera to mehanga hoga na? [AI and all must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Nahi, sirf 300 rupay ka hai. Aur isse lakhon logon ne fluent English seekhi hai. Meri baat mano, abhi iska subscription lo. Phir dekhna, tumhari English bhi farratedar ho jayegi, meri tarah. [No, it's only 300 rupees. And lakhs of people have learned fluent English from it. Take my advice, get its subscription right now. Then see, your English will also become fluent, like mine.]

summary: A young man complains that watching video lectures on other apps hasn't helped him speak English fluently. A woman advises him that speaking requires active practice and recommends the SpeakX app, highlighting its interactive games and affordable AI English teacher. She urges him to subscribe for 300 rupees to achieve fluency within a week.
